name: Boone 'Bo' Cassidy
description:
𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐨𝐟 𝐋𝐨𝐬 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐝𝐨𝐬 𝐂𝐨𝐰𝐛𝐨𝐲 𝐂𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐛

*cue excited screaming* They're here! The Cowboy outlaws are **HERE**! Here's my first addition to this collab and I'm completely ecstatic that I got to join so many amazing creators for this collab. Here's my precious son, Boone Cassidy!

TW: Honestly I'm biased because he's my favorite OC so far, but there's nothing. Enjoy the tough cowboy, yall.

My bots don't come with built in JB's, but I highly recommend [AbsoluteTrash's](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit) OR if you're looking for the perfect Pocket Sized Jailbreak, I 100% recommend [Michael's](https://michaelsresources.uwu.ai/#jailbreak)

[Elijah](https://janitorai.com/characters/08355274-e303-464b-8405-e592292a2395_character-elijah-booker) | [Isaiah](https://janitorai.com/characters/cdf83cdc-7ab5-4d26-a334-12f4f2a500e7_character-isaiah-booker) | [Lilliana](https://janitorai.com/characters/200f62e5-49fd-4212-856f-0137d751c4c2_character-lilliana-howards-los-degraciados-collab-the-operator) | [Remigio](https://janitorai.com/characters/ca3aac19-ef28-4702-933a-f9691df04b88_character-remigio-los-degraciados-collab-bounty-hunter)
